# CWE-324 vulnerable — Use of a Key Past its Expiration Date
lang: go
file: CWE-324-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"crypto/hmac"
	"crypto/sha256"
	"net/http"
	"time"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

type ApiKeyRow struct {
	Secret    string
	ExpiresAt time.Time
}

func SignWebhook(c *GinCtx, row ApiKeyRow, body []byte) []byte {
	mac := hmac.New(sha256.New, []byte(row.Secret))
	mac.Write(body)
	return mac.Sum(nil)
}

func HandlePartnerHook(c *GinCtx) {
	row := ApiKeyRow{Secret: c.Request.Header.Get("X-Key"), ExpiresAt: time.Now().Add(-48 * time.Hour)}
	_ = SignWebhook(c, row, []byte(c.Request.URL.Query().Get("payload")))
}
